176161.name: Share of global cumulative CO2 emissions from cement
176161.description: Cumulative production-based emissions of carbon dioxide (CO2) from cement since 1750, measured as a percentage of global production-based emissions of CO2 from cement since 1750. This is based on territorial emissions, which do not account for emissions embedded in traded goods. Each country's share of global CO2 emissions from cement has been calculated by Our World in Data using global CO2 emissions from cement provided in the Global Carbon Budget dataset. Global cement emissions include all country emissions.

display.name: Share of global cumulative CO₂ emissions from cement

176161.datasetName: Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020)
176161.s_name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project

source.name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project
source.dataPublishedBy: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project
source.additionalInfo:
The Global Carbon Budget dataset is available at https://folk.universitetetioslo.no/roberan/GCB2020.shtml (1750-2019) and https://doi.org/10.18160/GCP-2020 (1959-2019).

Full reference for the Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020) dataset: Friedlingstein et al, Global Carbon Budget 2020, Earth Syst. Sci. Data, 12, 3269–3340, https://doi.org/10.5194/essd-12-3269-2020, 2020.

Our World in Data have renamed the category "bunker fuels" as "International transport" for improved clarity, which includes emissions from international aviation and shipping.
